name: alterlab-clinical-reports
description: Writes comprehensive clinical reports — case reports (CARE guidelines), diagnostic reports (radiology, pathology, lab), clinical trial reports (ICH-E3, SAE, CSR), and patient documentation (SOAP notes, H&P, discharge summaries) — with templates, regulatory compliance (HIPAA, FDA, ICH-GCP), and validation tools. Use when drafting a case report for journal publication, a radiology/pathology/lab diagnostic report, an ICH-E3 clinical study report (CSR) or SAE narrative, or SOAP/H&P/discharge patient
author: AlterLab-IEU
